log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Round 1: Too far for melee. Spiritual Weapon + ranged.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Firbolg — Winged Striker.
ACTION: Cast Spiritual Weapon (Level 2 slot). melee_spell attack vs Firbolg — Winged Striker.
→ melee_spell attack: [d20:6+3=9 vs AC 14] MISS.
ACTION: Cast Sacred Flame (Level 0). DC 11 DEX save on Firbolg — Winged Striker.
→ Firbolg — Winged Striker: DEX save [d20:14+6=20 vs DC 11] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Firbolg — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 5 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):11+1=12 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):14+1=15 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):11+1=12 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):16+1=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Mage: WIS save [d20:1+4=5 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 4/5 targets affected.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.

REASONING: Ally charmed by Hypnotic Pattern! Shaking Cult Fanatic awake.
ACTION: Shakes Cult Fanatic awake! Charmed + Incapacitated removed.
